completedDays.title: Day 01 - Infrastructure and Project Setup
completedDays.summary: Configured the thesis production pipeline, GitHub Pages dashboard, and Obsidian documentation workflow.

completedDays.title: Day 02 - UE5 Framework Initialization
completedDays.summary: Created the UE5.7.4 C++ project, enabled destruction-related plugins, configured project folders, and initialized the core/destruction framework classes.

completedDays.title: Day 03 - First Destruction Actor Prototype
completedDays.summary: Created the first destruction sandbox, generated and fractured a Geometry Collection asset, validated Chaos integration, and documented the event-driven destruction architecture.

completedDays.title: Day 04 - Destruction Event System Foundation
completedDays.summary: Implemented the first event-driven destruction framework architecture, created the destruction-event data structure, expanded destruction management components, and validated framework communication through runtime event processing.
